name: MK-677
subtitle: Ghrelin Receptor Agonist | Oral Growth Hormone Secretagogue
overview: Oral compound activating ghrelin receptors to trigger growth hormone release while preserving natural production. Achieves superior oral bioavailability exceeding 60% with a 24-hour half-life, making it unique among GH secretagogues for its convenient once-daily oral dosing.
mechanism: Selectively binds GHS-R1a receptors in hypothalamus and pituitary, triggering pulsatile growth hormone release while maintaining natural circadian patterns.
keyBenefits: Enhanced sleep quality with improved REM patterns
Preferential lean tissue gains of 1.1-2.7kg over 8-12 months
15% basal metabolic rate increase within 2 weeks

items.name: GH Restoration
items.description: Restores youthful growth hormone levels in elderly subjects with 97% increase in 24-hour secretion.

items.name: IGF-1 Enhancement
items.description: Sustained 40-72% IGF-1 elevation over extended periods.

items.name: Sleep Enhancement
items.description: 20% REM increase in younger adults; 50% improvement in elderly.

items.name: Muscle Preservation
items.description: Demonstrates +2.69g/day nitrogen retention versus -8.97g/day placebo, protecting lean mass during caloric restriction.

items.name: Fat-Free Mass
items.description: Increases fat-free mass with preferential lean tissue accrual.

items.name: Metabolic Rate
items.description: 15% basal metabolic rate elevation documented at 2 weeks.

items.name: Bone Formation
items.description: 39-45% increase in bone formation markers within 6-8 weeks.

deliveryMethods.overview: Optimal bioavailability eliminates injection requirements with convenient daily dosing. Take at bedtime on empty stomach for best results.

interactions.notes: Complementary GH pathways providing combined pulsatile and baseline elevation.
Both stimulate GH release through different mechanisms.
MK-677 baseline elevation combines with GHRP-2 pulsatile spikes.
Systemic growth factors complement localized healing.
MK-677 decreases insulin sensitivity; requires blood glucose monitoring.
Case report documents 85.7% testosterone suppression and significant liver enzyme elevation when combined.

timeline.effects: Improved sleep quality, vivid dreams, possible appetite increase
Enhanced recovery, better sleep architecture, initial body composition changes
Noticeable lean mass gains, continued sleep benefits
Maximum body composition improvements, sustained GH elevation

stopSigns: Shortness of breath, chest pain, or unusual fatigue
Blood glucose levels >100mg/dL or diabetes symptoms
Severe fluid retention or unexplained swelling
contraindications: Heart disease or congestive heart failure

warning: Products labeled 'for research only' may lack quality control
bad: Dietary supplement claims (FDA prohibits MK-677 in supplements)
Unknown purity or source without certificates of analysis
Unusually low prices suggesting counterfeit product

references.title: Effects of a 7-day treatment with a novel, orally active, growth hormone (GH) secretagogue, MK-677, on 24-hour GH profiles, insulin-like growth factor I, and adrenocortical function in normal young men
references.keyFindings: Randomized, double-blind crossover in 9 healthy young men. 7-day oral MK-677 (5 and 25mg) increased 24-hour GH profiles dose-dependently while preserving circadian patterns.

references.title: Stimulation of the growth hormone (GH)-insulin-like growth factor I axis by daily oral administration of a GH secretagogue (MK-677) in healthy elderly subjects
references.keyFindings: Randomized, double-blind trial in 32 elderly subjects (64-81 years). 25mg/day MK-677 for up to 4 weeks increased mean 24-hour GH by 97% and restored IGF-I concentrations to young adult levels.

references.title: Prolonged oral treatment with MK-677, a novel growth hormone secretagogue, improves sleep quality in man
references.keyFindings: In young adults, 25mg MK-677 increased stage IV sleep duration by 50% and REM sleep by 20%. In older adults, REM sleep increased nearly 50% with decreased REM latency. Sleep deviations dropped from 42% to 8%.

references.title: MK-677, an orally active growth hormone secretagogue, reverses diet-induced catabolism
references.keyFindings: Double-blind crossover in 8 healthy volunteers under caloric restriction. 25mg/day MK-677 for 7 days reversed nitrogen wasting (+2.69g/day vs -8.97g/day placebo) and significantly increased IGF-I.

references.title: Two-month treatment of obese subjects with the oral growth hormone (GH) secretagogue MK-677 increases GH secretion, fat-free mass, and energy expenditure
references.keyFindings: 24 obese males treated with 25mg/day for 8 weeks showed sustained increases in GH, IGF-I, fat-free mass, and a transient increase in basal metabolic rate at 2 weeks.

references.title: Oral administration of the growth hormone secretagogue MK-677 increases markers of bone turnover in healthy and functionally impaired elderly adults
references.journal: Journal of Bone and Mineral Research
references.keyFindings: 187 elderly adults (65+) across three placebo-controlled studies. 9 weeks of MK-677 increased serum osteocalcin by 29.4%, bone-specific alkaline phosphatase by 10.4%, and urinary NTX by 22.6%.

references.title: Effects of an oral ghrelin mimetic on body composition and clinical outcomes in healthy older adults: a randomized trial
references.keyFindings: 12-month RCT in 65 healthy adults (60-81 years). MK-677 increased GH and IGF-I to young adult levels, increased fat-free mass while placebo group declined, and was generally well tolerated.

latestResearch.title: FDA Warning: Potential Health Risks of MK-677
latestResearch.summary: Official communication highlighting significant cardiovascular risks and investigational drug status.

latestResearch.title: LGD-4033 and MK-677 use impacts body composition, circulating biomarkers, and skeletal muscle androgenic hormone and receptor content: A case report
latestResearch.summary: Case report documenting that co-administration of LGD-4033 and MK-677 increased body mass and lean mass but negatively impacted serum lipids, liver enzymes, and testosterone levels (85.7% suppression when combined with the SARM).

latestResearch.title: Hepatotoxicity induced by MK-677
latestResearch.summary: Case report of a man in his early 30s who developed transaminitis after 2 months of MK-677 use. Liver function returned to normal after discontinuation, highlighting the need for liver monitoring during use.

quickStats.typicalDose: Start 12.5mg daily, increase to 25mg based on tolerance
quickStats.frequency: Once daily, preferably at bedtime on empty stomach
quickStats.storage: Room temperature in cool, dry place; no refrigeration required
